lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, who are you?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: I'm one of Trader Stan's crew; we are all part of the largest fleet of trading and sailing vessels to ever sail the seven seas.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: If you want to get to a port in a hurry then you can charter one of our ships to take you there - if the price is right...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, where exactly can I go with your ships?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: We run ships from Port Phasmatys over to Port Tyras, stopping at Port Sarim, Catherby, Brimhaven, Musa Point, Port Khazard and more besides!

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: We might dock at Mos Le'Harmless once in a while, as well, if you catch my meaning...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, that's a lot of ports. I take it you have some exotic stuff to trade?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: We certainly do! We have access to items bought and sold from around the world. Would you like to take a look? Or would you like to charter a ship?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, let's see what you're trading.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't it tricky to sail about in those clothes?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Tricky? Tricky!

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: With all due credit, Trader Stan is a great employer, but he insists we wear the latest in high fashion even when sailing.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Do you have even the slightest idea how tricky it is to sail in this stuff?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Some of us tried tearing it and arguing that it was too fragile to wear when on a boat, but he just had it enchanted to re-stitch itself.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: It's hard to hate him when we know how much he shells out on this gear, but if I fall overboard because of this getup one more time, I'm going to quit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, that's kind of harsh.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Anyway, would you like to take a look at our exotic wares from around the world? Or would you like to charter a ship?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I would like to charter a ship.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Certainly [sir/madam]. Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Crandor? Are you crazy?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: No charter ship would take you to that island. You'd need to buy your own ship and, even then, you'd have trouble finding a captain crazy enough to go there.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Sorry, we aren't a laundry ship. You'll need to leave those dirty bedsheets behind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you let me bring it if I told you it was a security blanket?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: No, then we would just mock you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I see.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Is that your bedsheet covered in filthy slime?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can say in all honesty that it is not.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Well, whoever it belongs to, it's not coming on this ship!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What brings you all the way out here?

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: The same thing that brings us everywhere, friend. We're here to trade. The tortugans were reluctant at first, but we eventually convinced them to let us do business with them.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: It's a shame they won't let us actually go beyond the docks though. I'd quite like to see the rest of their island...

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Anyway, would you like to take a look at our exotic wares from around the world? Or would you like to charter a ship?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Trader Crewmember
lines.text: Why do you want to travel to a port you are already at? Do you want to travel somewhere else?
